arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta details 'step by step' plan for Arsenal record breaker before Shakhtar Donestk clash
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Ethan Nwaneri has impressed when handed an opportunity by Mikel Arteta this season but the Spanish coach is determined to be thoughtful over the teenager's progress

arts.ttl: 'Goal of the season!' | Carra explains how Bournemouth exploited Arsenal weakness
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher claims that Bournemouth's first goal against Arsenal was the 'goal of the season' so far and suggests that it's a set-piece tactic that he's never seen before.

arts.ttl: How Bournemouth exploited an Arsenal weakness | Carra: 'It's goal of the season'
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher claims that Bournemouth's first goal against Arsenal was the 'goal of the season so far' and suggests that it's a set-piece tactic that he's never seen before.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could do something for first time since 2018 with projected £548m finance reveal
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has restored Arsenal to former glories in so many ways but there is still one thing – besides the Premier League title –...

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Sporting president refuses to rule out Viktor Gyokeres exit amid Gunners interest
arts.sum: Sporting Lisbon president Frederico Varandas refuses to rule out a January departure for Viktor Gyokeres amid interest from Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal quoted hefty price for the 'next Sancho'
arts.sum: Gittens - who dropped the 'Bynoe' part of his name ahead of the new season - started the campaign like a house on fire, coming off the bench to score a brace in BVB's opening Bundesliga game against Eintracht Frankfurt . He again netted a brace in the Champions League against Club Brugge and he has notched three assists in all competitions, but all things considered, it still hasn't really clicked for the Englishman, who has had to contend with inevitable comparisons to ex-Dortmund favourite Jadon Sancho due to his position, nationality and career path, joining the German giants from Man City as a teenager.

arts.ttl: Man City star Jack Grealish issues honest Arsenal message in Premier League title race verdict
arts.sum: Jack Grealish has revealed Manchester City are not currently thinking about Arsenal with the two teams expected to again fight for the Premier League title. Like I say, we have to use it as a compliment." The 29-year-old was also quizzed on City's title rivals, which includes Arsenal, but he was keen to point out that other teams are not at the forefront of their minds.

arts.ttl: Arsenal given harsh Viktor Gyokeres transfer reality as Edu faces tough January call - Tom Canton
arts.sum: He so far has three goals in five games with four assists to his name too – adding the last this weekend in the 3-0 win over Antalyaspor, although injuries have affected his availability at points which continue to be a problem raised by critics. Yet, based on the defeat to Bournemouth at the weekend, even if Arsenal signed all three, it arguably wouldn’t have seen them win.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star admits to 'confidence' issues over red card problems
arts.sum: With red cards proving to be a massive issue for Arsenal this season, Partey urged the squad to heed Arteta's warning that they will not win the Premier League title if they continue to let themselves drop to ten men during games. "We have a very good squad and we know every time we stay with 11 men on the pitch we are going to dominate the game and we are always thinking of winning.

arts.ttl: Why Mikel Arteta won't need one-to-one with William Saliba despite Arsenal star's difficult spell
arts.sum: Two-time Premier League winner Lauren has insisted that Mikel Arteta will not need to have a meeting with William Saliba to keep his confidence up after a difficult week for the Arsenal defender. "I believe Saliba is a big player and we saw with his absence last year when we lost him in a key moment in the league and we lost some games, we struggled to get the results without Saliba.
